prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon race day preparation with carbohydrate loading for endurance performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day
Total daily caloric intake is appropriate for a 72kg endurance athlete (approximately 3000-3500 calories)
Carbohydrates comprise 60-65% of total calories to support marathon training/preparation
All meals comply with vegetarian and nut-free restrictions
Plan is presented in compact, concise format suitable for quick reference
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-performance endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high caloric intake and carbohydrate-loading strategy

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and muscle gain for weightlifting competition in 8 weeks
prompt_inputs.restrictions: No shellfish allergy; prefers whole foods over supplements

solution_criteria: Meal plan is compact and covers exactly one full day
Includes at least 4 meals with high protein content (minimum 25g protein per meal)
Contains pre- and post-training meals strategically timed around weightlifting session
All meals align with strength/power athlete nutritional needs without violating stated restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing high protein content and specific timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Match performance and recovery for soccer

solution_criteria: Meal plan is compact and covers one full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
All meals are vegan-compliant with no animal products
Includes adequate protein from plant-based sources (legumes, tofu, nuts, seeds) to support athletic recovery
Provides balanced macronutrients and carbohydrates suitable for soccer performance and endurance
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary restriction scenario (vegan soccer player) requiring alternative protein sources and nutritional balance
